description: Public-safe actor validation targets. These are audit/index records only; validation must launch the real profile and let OpenMW stream cells and place actors from game data.

targets.label: E3_Story02a_ShipServices
notes: Known New Atlantis Ship Services actor record from local mined metadata.
Starfield remains renderer research, not a connected-world baseline. Do not force render-disabled actors, materials, or camera placement to count this as a real-world proof.

runtimeValidation.rule: Launch the real profile and verify the actor only if the engine streams and enables it from game data; do not stage actors or drive placement from mined coordinates.
